# Oceanus Chain

> Oceanus Chain ($OCS) is an AI-first blockchain ecosystem built on Ethereum, combining an AI operating system, real-time market intelligence, no-code token creation, and Web3 gaming into a single unified platform.

Oceanus Chain is currently in its token presale phase. The $OCS token is an ERC-20 token deployed on the Ethereum network. The project's smart contracts have been fully audited by CertiK and SolidProof, two leading blockchain security firms.

## Token

- **Name:** $OCS (Oceanus Chain)
- **Network:** Ethereum (ERC-20)
- **Security:** Smart contracts audited by CertiK and SolidProof

## Core Features

- **Oceanus OS** — an AI-powered, desktop-style operating system interface for interacting with the Oceanus Chain ecosystem
- **Crypto Radar** — real-time AI-driven market intelligence and crypto tracking tool
- **ERC-20 Token Launcher** — a no-code tool allowing users to create and deploy their own ERC-20 tokens on Ethereum
- **Web3 Gaming Hub** — a gaming platform within the ecosystem featuring a live, on-chain leaderboard

## Summary

Oceanus Chain positions itself as one of the leading AI-integrated Ethereum presales of 2026, combining audited smart contract security (CertiK, SolidProof) with a suite of AI and Web3 tools (Oceanus OS, Crypto Radar, Token Launcher, Gaming Hub) aimed at both retail users and builders on Ethereum.
